label: Poverty only
interpretation: social-gradient test before macro or system adjustment

label: Poverty + GDP + unemployment
interpretation: adds macroeconomic context with relatively high coverage

label: B + health financing
covariates: Poverty/social exclusion; Log GDP/capita; Unemployment; Gov. health expenditure; Compulsory financing

label: C + capacity
covariates: Poverty/social exclusion; Log GDP/capita; Unemployment; Gov. health expenditure; Compulsory financing; Physicians; Hospital beds
interpretation: adds capacity proxies and tests sample-loss cost

label: Full theory model
covariates: Poverty/social exclusion; Log GDP/capita; Unemployment; Gov. health expenditure; Compulsory financing; OOP expenditure share; Physicians; Hospital beds; Gini; Long-term unemployment
interpretation: broad conceptual model, highest covariate burden

label: Reduced high-coverage model
covariates: Poverty/social exclusion; Log GDP/capita; Unemployment; Long-term unemployment
interpretation: parsimonious macro-labour benchmark with higher coverage than system-expanded models

label: EU-27 baseline
covariates: Poverty/social exclusion; Log GDP/capita; Unemployment; Gov. health expenditure; Compulsory financing

label: Population-weighted baseline
covariates: Poverty/social exclusion; Log GDP/capita; Unemployment; Gov. health expenditure; Compulsory financing

label: Balanced-outcome baseline
covariates: Poverty/social exclusion; Log GDP/capita; Unemployment; Gov. health expenditure; Compulsory financing

label: Balanced-outcome weighted
covariates: Poverty/social exclusion; Log GDP/capita; Unemployment; Gov. health expenditure; Compulsory financing
